last_task.subject:
Research tasks for Arc (or maybe Iris too?). Good way to test out what the agent can do for you and how you communicate on the LAN between VMs. Also would be great if I can follow along and join in group conversation through Arc Observatory on port 4000. The faster we can build while I'm steering I think we could take off. Queue tasks for all the research, link dump incoming:
